content:
- Used add-task-as-agent and add-meta-task skill instructions to create new task artifacts under .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness.
- Added 17-task-deep-skeptical-codebase-review-model-gated.md with the exact requested model gate, no-test scope, deep skeptical review criteria, issue fanout rules, and final model reset to normal_high.
- Added 18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md as a true meta-task with required warning line, recurring/fresh-run rules, explicit never-change-passes note, and exploration template.
- Added very short ordered follow-up tasks 19/20/21 that each say to do meta-task 18, chained with blocked_by for sequence over time.
- Did not run tests, did not modify runtime code, and did not revert any unrelated dirty-worktree changes.
- Next: if asked, can create additional short scheduling tasks (22/23/...) or adjust wording/ordering conventions.

- Read prior memory + current task pointer, loaded bug task file, and found marker at TO BE VERIFIED.
- Performed deep skeptical verification with broad parallel code scans; updated task plan with additional order/thread-sensitivity checks and switched marker to NOW EXECUTE.
- Implemented explicit real-test fixture ownership in src/process/worker.rs (`RealProcessFixture`) so StateSubscriber, worker context, sender, and NamespaceGuard live together for full async job lifecycle.
- Moved real promote/demote/start-stop/restart/fencing tests to fixture submit/wait helpers and added explicit subscriber snapshot reads during outcome polling for diagnostics.
- Added regression test `start_job_returns_channel_closed_when_all_subscribers_are_dropped` to prove channel-close semantics when all receivers are gone.
- Hit known stale-target linker artifact error (`missing *.rcgu.o`), recovered with `cargo clean`, then reran targeted tests and full required gates successfully.
- Captured evidence logs under `.ralph/evidence/process-worker-real-job-tests-state-channel-closed-20260302/` and updated bug task file to done/true/passing true.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`, updated AGENTS.md with a new cross-app learning about avoiding underscore-only lifetime assumptions, and committed everything with hash 154d4f4.
- Next step after quitting: pick up the next task from updated Ralph pointers.
